title: mikania micayensis
intro: Mikania micayensis, also known as "Kana ayusa" or "Palo de fierro," is a plant native to the Andean region of South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Mikania micayensis include relief from pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as potential anti-anxiety and anticonvulsant effects. Herbal preparations of Mikania micayensis can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
